title: Block Indicator - Infoblox NIOS
content:
This playbook blocks the given Indicator by creating or updating RP Zone rule in Infoblox NIOS platform.

Cortex XSOAR/XSIAM SOAR playbook from the Infoblox Inc. pack (Infoblox, partner-supported).

Use cases: Network Security.

Inputs — indicator: The indicator to block.; target_rp_zone: The target Response Policy Zone..

Integrations/scripts used: infoblox-create-response-policy-zone, infoblox-create-rpz-rule, infoblox-list-response-policy-zones, infoblox-search-rule, infoblox-update-rpz-rule.
